_doc: File inventory for the Relatedness Atlas. Round 1 (2026-05-11) ships an empty file table on purpose — the round-1 mock runs entirely off baked-in DEMO data inside atlases/relatedness/shared/demo_data.js. The real file contracts (status-pill targets: .res / beagle.gz / prune / inversion candidates TSV) land in a follow-up round.

res._doc: ngsRelate 23-column .res output for the cohort. Target of the .res pillBar slot.

beagle._doc: Cohort genotype likelihoods. Target of the beagle pillBar slot.

prune._doc: NAToRA / first-degree pruning list (optional). Target of the prune pillBar slot.

inversion_candidates._doc: Inversion candidates TSV exported from the Inversion Atlas catalogue. Target of the inv pillBar slot.
